title: angianthus laniger
intro: Angianthus laniger, also known as woolly button or woolly daisy, is a flowering plant native to Australia and is characterized by its white or pink flowers and woolly foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Angianthus laniger include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations. Angianthus laniger can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and topical creams for its medicinal and health benefits, making it a popular choice in natural remedies.
